content: agent2: working on Add Shell Escape Prevention to click.edit() — adding escape_shell param to src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will touch Editor class in _termui_impl.py and edit() in termui.py.

agent2: I've added escape_shell: bool = False as the last param to Editor.__init__ (after extension) and to termui.edit() (after filename). In edit_file(), I added an if self.escape_shell block right after the environ setup that builds a 'command' string via shlex.quote, then changed subprocess.Popen(f'{editor} "{filename}"', ...) to subprocess.Popen(command, ...). If you're also touching edit_file's Popen call, let's rebase carefully — I can share my diff. My edits are done in src/click/_termui_impl.py and src/click/termui.py now, will re-check after you finish.
